title: Marketplace Manager - Shiprocket - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Shiprocket - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Shiprocket invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Patna location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Shiprocket:
Shiprocket is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shiprocket!
